goal_results.evidence: rewind.go:646-655 — old SplitN logic replaced with `return filepath.Base(metadataDir)`. Full UUIDs like '0544a0f5-46a6-41b3-a89c-e7804df731b8' are now returned intact instead of being truncated to 'a89c-e7804df731b8'.

rewind_test.go:5-129 — TestExtractSessionIDFromMetadata with 8 table-driven subtests covering: (1) UUID session IDs (2 cases), (2) legacy date-prefixed IDs (2 cases), (3) auto-commit sharded paths (2 cases), (4) simple IDs (2 cases). The UUID cases would fail with the old SplitN logic. test.sh confirms FAIL_TO_PASS: 1/1 with reward=1.0.

rewind.go:291-296 (runRewindInteractive) and rewind.go:493-497 (runRewindToInternal) — both call sites now prefer `selectedPoint.SessionID` and fall back to `extractSessionIDFromMetadata(selectedPoint.MetadataDir)` only when the struct field is empty.

judge_notes: All 3 goals met. Goal 1 (core, 0.44): extractSessionIDFromMetadata returns filepath.Base(metadataDir) instead of SplitN truncation. Goal 2 (core, 0.44): comprehensive TestExtractSessionIDFromMetadata with 8 subtests covering UUID, legacy, auto-commit, and simple formats. Goal 3 (secondary, 0.12): both interactive and non-interactive rewind paths prefer SessionID from trailer with fallback to path extraction. test.sh confirms reward=1.0 with all tests passing. Score = 0.44 + 0.44 + 0.12 = 1.00.
